rulings.Case Title: WOODBRIDGE GLASS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. OCEANWIDE CENTER, LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PLAINTIFF WOODBRIDGE GLASS, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STAY ENTIRE ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF WOODBRIDGE GLASS, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STAY ENTIRE ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare an order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MAXVI 1 LLC VS. NATALIA ALDANA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2023 line 6. DEFENDANT NATALIA ALDANA'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO AMEND ANSWER Hearing Required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on January 17, 2022 (1) Defendant's counsel Steven Miyake to file a declaration addressing the delay in filing this motion - according to Defendant's declaration counsel was retained on December 2, 2022 and this motion was filed 14 days later on December 16, 2022; (2) Defendant to file an amended proposed answer containing facts in support of all three proposed additional affirmative defenses. If this motion is granted, Defendant will be ordered to file and serve an amended answer by noon on January 17, 2023. Plaintiff will be allowed to serve supplemental discovery requests via e-mail and Defendant will provide complete verified responses via e-mail within 24 hours of service of discovery. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SHE H. HSIEH VS. SAB EQUITABLE SF LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2023 line 9. DEFENDANT SAB EQUITABLE SF LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party failed to show based on the complaint or judicially noticeable documents that the moratorium was in place, that defendant is a "covered commercial tenant" as defined in the SFAC or that defendant was unable to pay the rent due to a Financial Impact Related to Covid-19. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
